AI Top 10 Stocks for Tomorrow

Multi-market screener combining technical + fundamental + news sentiment. Get entry, targets & stop-loss with clear reasoning. Free · No sign-up.

How Scores Work

📊 TA Score
+1 price > SMA50 · +1 SMA50 > SMA200 · +1 RSI 45–65 · +1 breakout · −1 RSI > 70 · −1 below support
💰 FA Score
+1 PE 8–25 · −1 PE > 35 · +1 dividend ≥ 1%
📰 News Score
Headline keyword sentiment from Yahoo Finance news (±2 cap)
📦 Volume Score
+1 last volume ≥ 1.5× 10-day avg · −1 if ≤ 0.7×

⚠️ Not investment advice. This is an educational screener. Always do your own research and consider your risk tolerance before trading.

Frequently Asked Questions

How are picks chosen?

Candidates are ranked using technical trend (SMA50/200, RSI), pattern context (near support/breakout), basic valuation (PE, dividend), and news sentiment from Yahoo Finance. The combined score determines the top picks.

Which markets are supported?

NSE, BSE, NASDAQ, NYSE, LSE (London), TSX (Toronto), TSE (Tokyo), SSE (Shanghai), HKEX (Hong Kong), and XETRA/Frankfurt — all via Yahoo Finance symbol suffix mapping.

How often does it update?

The daily snapshot refreshes once every 24 hours automatically. Use the Refresh button to force a fresh compute.

🎥 How to pick top stocks for your portfolio

✅ Do's and ❌ Don'ts

✅ Do's

  • ✅ Do review AI-generated content before using or publishing it.
  • ✅ Do use AI output as a starting point for your own work.
  • ✅ Do double-check facts and figures in AI-generated content.
  • ✅ Do bookmark this tool for quick access.

❌ Don'ts

  • ❌ Don't assume AI output is always 100% accurate.
  • ❌ Don't enter sensitive personal data — only provide what's needed for generation.
  • ❌ Don't publish AI content without human review and editing.
  • ❌ Don't use AI content to spread misinformation.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this tool free to use?

Yes. All UpTools calculators are completely free, with no sign-ups required.

Is my data private?

Yes. Your input is sent to our secure AI API for processing only and is never stored or shared.

Does it work on mobile?

Yes. All tools are mobile-responsive and work on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop.

Does this work offline?

No. This AI tool requires an internet connection to send your request to our secure API.

📐 How This Tool Works

This tool uses AI to generate content. Your input is sent to our secure AI API and is not stored.

Results are generated in seconds — no waiting for local processing.
